---
name: Platform rule update
about: A platform's official posting rule changed and a source doc is stale

---

## Platform

Which platform and which file under `docs/platforms/`?

## What changed

State the old rule and the new rule.

## Official source

Link to the official source confirming the change. Required.

## Affected templates or checklists

List anything else that must change to stay consistent.
